description: Administrative Unit for EMEA (Europe, Middle East, Africa) region. Allows regional IT admins to manage only users in their geography.

administrativeUnit.description: EMEA region users — scoped management for regional IT admins

members.notes: EMEA regional IT admins — can manage user accounts within this AU only
EMEA helpdesk — password resets and account unlocks within this AU only

notes: Add or remove country codes as the organization grows. Pair with location-based CA policy for additional controls.
